description.value: Bridge-applied aura source for Courageous Anthem (CNMH #455). When applied to the caster it emits the stock Spell Effect: Courageous Anthem to the caster and every ally within a 60-foot emanation, then expires at the start of the caster's next turn (matching the spell's 1-round duration). The CNMH app references this effect by slug (slug:courageous-anthem-aura); import it once into the World Items directory and the bridge resolves it automatically.
